Coerce xtabs Object to Array or Matrix

Source: R/as.matrix.xtabs.R
as.array.xtabs.Rd

Converts an object of class "xtabs" to a plain matrix by dropping all additional classes such as "xtabs" and "table".

Usage

# S3 method for class 'xtabs'
as.array(x, ...)

Arguments

x

An object of class "xtabs".

...

Ignored.

Value

A matrix with no additional classes.

See also

Other data.manipulation: appendEnum(), appendRowNames(), appendX(), asBinary(), asCDateFmt(), columnWrap(), combLevels(), compareDataFrames(), dummy(), nf(), recodeX(), recycle(), renameX(), revCode(), revX(), setAttr-removeAttr-keepAttr, setNamesX(), sortX(), splitAt(), splitX(), stringsAsFactors(), toBaseR()

Examples

xt <- xtabs(~ cyl + gear, data = mtcars)
class(as.matrix(xt))
#> [1] "matrix" "array" 
# "matrix"
